records.question: What molecules with a label of + contain bromine atoms?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT molecule.molecule_id FROM molecule
JOIN atom ON molecule.molecule_id = atom.molecule_id
WHERE atom.element = 'br' AND molecule.label = '+'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT molecule.molecule_id
FROM molecule
JOIN atom ON molecule.molecule_id = atom.molecule_id
WHERE molecule.label = '+'
  AND atom.element = 'br'
GROUP BY molecule.molecule_id

records.question: Which molecules have a label of - and contain atoms with the element sn?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT molecule.molecule_id FROM molecule
JOIN atom ON molecule.molecule_id = atom.molecule_id
WHERE atom.element = 'sn' AND molecule.label = '-'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT molecule.molecule_id
FROM molecule
JOIN atom ON molecule.molecule_id = atom.molecule_id
WHERE molecule.label = '-' AND atom.element = 'sn'
GROUP BY molecule.molecule_id

records.question: Which molecules have at least one atom with the element exactly equal to 'f' and also have at least one bond?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT molecule.molecule_id FROM molecule
JOIN atom ON molecule.molecule_id = atom.molecule_id
JOIN bond ON molecule.molecule_id = bond.molecule_id
WHERE atom.element = 'f'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT molecule.molecule_id
FROM molecule
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM atom
    WHERE atom.molecule_id = molecule.molecule_id
      AND atom.element = 'f'
)
AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM bond
    WHERE bond.molecule_id = molecule.molecule_id
)

records.question: Which molecules labeled + contain atoms with element na and have bonds where bond_type is -?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT molecule.molecule_id FROM molecule
JOIN atom ON molecule.molecule_id = atom.molecule_id
JOIN bond ON molecule.molecule_id = bond.molecule_id
WHERE atom.element = 'na' AND bond.bond_type = '-' AND molecule.label = '+'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT molecule.molecule_id
FROM molecule
WHERE molecule.label = '+'
AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM atom
    WHERE atom.molecule_id = molecule.molecule_id
      AND atom.element = 'na'
)
AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM bond
    WHERE bond.molecule_id = molecule.molecule_id
      AND bond.bond_type = '-'
)

records.question: What molecules have a label exactly '-' and contain bonds where the bond type is exactly '-' with atoms whose element is exactly 'f'?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT molecule.molecule_id FROM molecule
JOIN atom ON molecule.molecule_id = atom.molecule_id
JOIN bond ON molecule.molecule_id = bond.molecule_id
WHERE molecule.label = '-' AND bond.bond_type = '-' AND atom.element = 'f'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT molecule.molecule_id
FROM molecule
WHERE molecule.label = '-'
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM atom
    WHERE atom.molecule_id = molecule.molecule_id
      AND atom.element = 'f'
  )
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM bond
    WHERE bond.molecule_id = molecule.molecule_id
      AND bond.bond_type = '-'
  )

JOIN bond ON molecule.molecule_id = bond.molecule_id
WHERE atom.element = 'c' AND molecule.label = '+' AND bond.bond_type = '#'

records.question: Which molecules have the label '-' and have at least one atom with element 'f' and also have at least one bond?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT molecule.molecule_id FROM molecule
JOIN atom ON molecule.molecule_id = atom.molecule_id
JOIN bond ON molecule.molecule_id = bond.molecule_id
WHERE molecule.label = '-' AND atom.element = 'f'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT m.molecule_id
FROM molecule m
WHERE m.label = '-'
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM atom a
    WHERE a.molecule_id = m.molecule_id AND a.element = 'f'
  )
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM bond b
    WHERE b.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
  )
